items.title: Two-pane shell renders (persistent sidebar + main pane)

items.title: Sessions grouped by project, with a 'No project' group

items.expected: Sessions appear under their project's name; ungrounded sessions appear under a 'No project' group.

items.title: Selecting a session opens it in the pane; row actions work
steps: 2. Hover a row and click re-run
3. Hover a row, click delete then confirm
items.expected: Clicking opens the session in the main pane (active row gets the accent bar). Re-run creates a clone and opens it at triage. Delete removes the session after the inline confirm.
items.notes: Not auto-run — no live app/DB in this environment.
items.waiver: Deferred to manual verification by the owner in the dev server (2026-07-01).

items.title: Full session flow runs inside the shell

items.title: Build, typecheck, and convention checks pass
items.precondition: Repo checked out with this change
items.expected: typecheck zero errors; build succeeds; backend hard violations 0; frontend tests pass.
items.evidence: tsc --noEmit clean; vite build OK; check-conventions backend 0 violations; frontend lint 0 errors / 4 advisory warnings; 2/2 frontend tests pass.
